programme.title: A Village's Heavenly River

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E62 - Rug Island'. On Bingo and Bluey's Rug Island, a pack of felt pens can be anything: bananas, campfires, even a snake. But Dad will need to embrace his inner kid if he wants to make it his home.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E57 - Charades'. Bluey and Bingo want everyone to play charades, but Muffin and Socks are too young to understand the rules and Nana must think quickly to keep the game on track.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E64 - Sticky Gecko'. Mum must get Bluey and Bingo out the door in time for a playdate, but they can't leave before they finish their game - waiting for a sticky rubber gecko to drop from the ceiling.

programme.title: Dog Squad
programme.desc: 'S1/E12 - Mission: Magic Show'. A little boy called Leo needs Sylvie's help performing his magic trick at show and tell.

programme.title: Ranger Hamza's Eco Quest
programme.desc: 'S2/E6'. Ranger Hamza and the Ramblers go on an eco quest to find out all about beavers.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E103 - Barky Boats'. Bluey and Mackenzie are excited to spend time with their two buddies Mia and Captain, when the older kids run off to play together without them, Calypso explains that growing up can be hard.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E81 - Library'. When Muffin is told that she is special by her dad, she interprets it as an excuse to do anything she wants, which means playing Bluey and Bingo's game of library her way.

programme.title: Swashbuckle
programme.desc: 'S8/E23 - Boom Family Reunion'. In this episode Seaweed is missing his family, so Sandy organises a 'Boom' video call with his (and Captain Captain's) unusual relatives.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E15 - Butterflies'. Playing 'Butterflies' in the backyard is great fun, until Bluey runs away with Judo leaving Bingo all alone. Now poor Bingo's heartbroken and Bluey needs to make amends.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Keepy Uppy'. Bluey, Bingo and Mum are enjoying playing Keepy-Uppy around the house, when Dad joins in and the game becomes the ultimate test of skill.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Daddy Robot'. Bluey and Bingo don't want to tidy the playroom, so they get Daddy Robot to do it. But when Bluey takes things too far, Daddy Robot malfunctions!

programme.title: Swashbuckle
programme.desc: 'S7/E19'. Sandy and Seaweed have started collecting 'Famous Pirates and Crew of the World' stickers only to discover there's one last rare sticker to find.

programme.title: Swashbuckle
programme.desc: 'S7/E20'. The pirates find a locker washed up on the shore belonging to the legendary pirate Davy Jones. But can they find a way to get to his legendary treasure inside?

programme.title: Topsy And Tim
programme.desc: 'S1/E63 - Getting Better'. While Topsy is recuperating, Tim realises his eyesight is not as good as it should be, so Mummy arranges for him to have an eye test.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E83 - Bin Night'. Bluey, Bingo and Dad always take out the bins. Over a few weeks, Bingo tells Dad about a new kid at kindy who is mean to her and Mum offers some good advice.

programme.title: Sleepy Time Stories - Sesotho
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Episode 1'. To celebrate South African Heritage Month, Cbeebies Sleepy Time Stories will shine a spotlight on some of the popular native languages Isizulu, Sesotho, Tsonga and Afrikaans.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E15 - Butterflies'. Playing 'Butterflies' in the backyard is great fun, until Bluey runs away with Judo leaving Bingo all alone. Now poor Bingo's heartbroken and Bluey needs to make amends.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E98 - Baby Race'. Mum reminisces about Bluey and Judo as babies. Bluey learnt to roll over first, but Judo was the first to crawl, so then it became a race to see who was going to walk first.

programme.title: Twirlywoos
programme.desc: 'S1/E65 - More About Inside'. The Twirlywoos fall inside a suit of armour - what fun will they have? Inside The Big Red Boat, The Box comes to visit the Twirlywoos. There are strange noises coming from inside.

programme.title: Roots and Fruits
programme.desc: 'S1/E23'. Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's the fastest woodwind player - Pear!

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: 'S1/E103 - Flamenco'. The Teletubbies are flamenco dancing! Tinky Winky, Dispy, Laa-Laa and Po are surprisingly good.

programme.title: In The Night Garden ZinkyZonk Specials
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Pontipines'. When the toys of the Night Garden cant sleep, the Zonk leads them to the ZonkyZoney, an enchanted grove where they can zinkyzzzonk in peace.

programme.title: Colourblocks
programme.desc: 'S1/E23'. The animated adventures of friends who bring colour to the world. Colours learn about themselves through adventure and play with the Colourblocks.

programme.title: Noddy: Toyland Detective
programme.desc: 'S1/E15 - Noddy and the Case of the Blue Wall'. All games of hide-and-seek are stopped when the town finds that someone has painted the workshop wall blue. It's up to Noddy to investigate the culprit behind it all.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E3 - Featherwand'. Bluey and Mum are off to Chloe's party and Bingo isn't invited. But armed with a magic featherwand that makes things incredibly heavy, Bingo can now stop them leaving the house.

programme.title: Yakka Dee
programme.desc: 'S6/E16 - Series 6, Episode 16'. Dee encourages a friend to say 'pumpkin', and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. There is an orange pumpkin, a bumpy pumpkin and a pumpkin with lots of seeds.

programme.title: Topsy And Tim
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Strange Beds'. The twins cannot sleep in their bunk beds because their room is being decorated by DIY Derek, so Dad tells them they are going on a camping adventure.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E56 - Squash'. When dad and Uncle Stripe play a game of squash, Bluey and Bingo are in control of their every move, and Bingo proves that big siblings don't always beat little siblings.

programme.title: Sleepy Time Stories - Sesotho
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Episode 1'. To celebrate South African Heritage Month, Cbeebies Sleepy Time Stories will shine a spotlight on some of the popular native languages Isizulu, Sesotho, Tsonga and Afrikaans.

programme.title: Mister Maker Comes To Town
programme.desc: 'S2/E2 - Giant Picture'. Discover how to make a giant picture with powder paint and squeezy bottles. Also, Mister Maker surprises the Mini Makers!

programme.title: Pop Paper City
programme.desc: 'S1/E37 - The Zip Express'. The friends board the Zip Express, a train that takes them across Pop Paper City. But when the friends face an unexpected challenge, it's unknown if the train will reach their destination on time.

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service
programme.desc: 'S2/E14 - Postman Pat and the Chinese Dragon'. It's 'Chinese Day' at school and the children are looking forward to Chinese themed celebrations. Michael has ordered a Chinese Dragon costume which Pat picks up at the sorting office.

programme.title: Dog Squad
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - Mission: Birthday Cake'. Guide dog Kika works with Dr Amit to buy what they need for a birthday celebration.

programme.title: JoJo & Gran Gran Special
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - It's Time For A Voyage'. JoJo, Gran Gran, Mummy and Daddy are at the airport waiting to take a flight to see a special someone - Great-Gran Gran in Saint Lucia. They're all ready to go - then their flight gets delayed!

programme.title: JoJo & Gran Gran Special
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - It's Time For A Voyage'. JoJo and Gran Gran go to an exhibition to learn about Gran Gran's journey to England. Gran Gran thinks she only has her coat from that time but realises she has more mementos too!

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service
programme.desc: 'S2/E17 - Postman Pat and the Amazing Weather Machine'. Ajay's organised a Summer Special Day on the Green but the sun is too hot. Ted's invention, a weather machine, might save the day!

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E21 - Blue Mountains'. Bluey, Bingo, Mum and Dad play a game of hand puppets, exploring the land beyond the Blue Mountains where they outsmart the Cheeky Fox to find the softest ever beds.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E22 - The Pool'. Packing for the pool, Bluey and Dad tease Mum about being so fussy with what to take. But when they arrive underprepared, they realise a little planning goes a long way.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E23 - Shops'. Playing 'Shops' is the best game ever for Bluey and her friends - if they can ever get started! With Bluey questioning the rules and changing who's who, they might be here all day!

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E24 - Wagon Ride'. Bluey can't wait to get to the monkey bars as Dad takes her and Bingo on a wagon ride to the park. But her patience is tested when Dad keeps stopping to chat with other grown-ups.

programme.title: Numberblocks
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Another One'. The Numberblocks present a special numbery version of the festive favourite featuring a Christmas train that flings gifts into the air. What could possibly go wrong?

programme.title: Numberblocks
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Two'. It's time for a time-travel adventure! Sixty-four's new time machine keeps sending the Numberblocks back in time - can they double up in time to fix it? Learn about doubling with the Numberblocks.

programme.title: Colourblocks
programme.desc: 'S1/E17'. The animated adventures of friends who bring colour to the world. Colours learn about themselves through adventure and play with the Colourblocks.

programme.title: Supertato
programme.desc: 'S1/E23 - Episode 23'. Supertato is delighted when Evil Pea becomes his sidekick but it's all a trick and Evil Pea captures him! Evil Pea is forced to do a good deed because one of the Cobs needs help.

programme.title: Supertato
programme.desc: 'S1/E24 - Episode 24'. Supertato and Evil Pea get stuck inside a giant bubble together. They float through the air until Supertato and Evil Pea pop the bubble by driving it into a supermarket sign.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E47 - Neighbours'. Bluey needs her Mum's advice on dealing with a troublesome neighbour, when the serenity of her couch cushion playhouse is threatened by Bingo's own growing stable of animals.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E48 - Teasing'. Bluey, Bingo and Mum get into a debate with Dad about the definition of teasing. As they recall all the times where he's been a Big Teaser, Dad argues that he was only just playing.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E49 - Asparagus'. Dad tells Bluey to mind her manners at the table - they're not animals. But when Bluey gets her hands on a stick of magic asparagus, she shows them everyone's got a wild side.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E50 - Shaun'. Bluey and Bingo want a pet. To show them how much work they'd be in for, Dad gets to transform his hand into their old friend Shaun, a chaotic, undisciplined Emu with a taste for trouble.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E86 - Double Babysitter'. When Uncle Rad and Frisky accidentally turn up to babysit Bluey and Bingo on the same night, they have to work together to make Bluey feel better about babysitter put-downs.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E60 - Daddy Dropoff'. Dad refuses to be late dropping off Bluey and Bingo at kindy and school, but the girls make Dad play so many games, they quickly derail his plan.

programme.title: Swashbuckle
programme.desc: 'S8/E20 - Uncle Joe King'. Captain Captain's Uncle Joe King is coming to visit. Uncle Joe is the best joker in the family and Captain Captain has got a big plan to play a joke on him!

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E37 - Mr Monkeyjocks'. Dad thinks the kids have too many toys and suggests a chuck out. To save their beloved Mr Monkeyjocks from getting the chop, Bluey and Bingo must prove he is special.

programme.desc: 'S2/E89 - Cafe'. In the park, Bluey meets a new playmate named Winnie, but when Bluey wants to invite her and her dad home for breakfast, she learns that adults take a little bit longer to make friends.

programme.desc: 'S6/E16 - Series 6, Episode 16'. Dee encourages a friend to say 'pumpkin', and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. There is an orange pumpkin, a bumpy pumpkin and a pumpkin with lots of seeds.

programme.title: Salvage Hunters

programme.desc: 'S15/E4'. How do they make the world's most famous electric guitar, the Fender Stratocaster? And, how do they make Swedish fermented cod roe Kalles caviar?

programme.desc: 'S2/E17 of 32 - Shintaro'. The ninja is invited to attend the birthday party of Princess Vania in the Kingdom of Shintaro. They bring along Master Wu who is feeling his age.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: 'S2/E13 of 26 - What About Bill'. When Bill the Flamingo moves into the guest habitat, the nosy new neighbor discovers our gang sneaking out for Alex's big catnip commercial audition and insists on joining their adventure.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! And The Chipmunks
programme.desc: 'S1/E127 of 52 - Mister Manners'. To get his dream meeting with the Princess of England, Alvin must pass a manners test by convincing Brittany he's worthy.

programme.title: My Little Pony: Friendship Is Magic
programme.desc: 'S6/E18 of 26 - Dungeons And Discords'. When the Mane 6 leave town, Discord decides to join Spike and Big Mac's 'top secret' Guys Night. Much to Discord's dismay, it turns out to be an evening of fantasy role-playing.

programme.title: The Jungle Bunch To The Rescue!
programme.desc: 'S1/E17 of 52 - Old Jim's treasure Part 4'. After a big fight against the pirates and a few traps, the Jungle Bunch reach the treasure!

programme.title: Takalani Sesame
programme.desc: 'S10/E11 of 26 - Exercise'. Join the friends on Takalani Sesame as they teach us all about 'Exercise' this week. Neno wants to participate in the weightlifting competition, but he has to exercise to get strong.

programme.title: eToonz Resumes At 06h00
programme.desc: A magic portal to free quality kids entertainment, the perfect place for kids from toddlers to tweens to explore a wonderland of fun.

programme.title: Grade 12 Physical Science
programme.desc: 'S3/E18 - Current Electricity, Direct Current'. We focus on current, ohm's law revision, emf and internal resistance.

programme.title: Grade 12 Physical Science
programme.desc: 'S3/E19 - Alternating Current'. We focus on motors, generators, alternating currents and electrical power.

programme.title: Grade 12 Physical Science
programme.desc: 'S3/E20 - Optical Phenomena and Properties of material. Photoelectric Effect'. We focus on the photoelectric effect, the threshold frequency of a metal, the work function of a metal, line emissions and absorption spectra.

programme.title: Grade 12 Physical Science
programme.desc: 'S3/E21 - Electrochemical Reactions. Galvanic Cells'. We focus on oxidation numbers, redox equations and reduction oxidation reactions.

programme.title: Grade 12 Physical Science
programme.desc: 'S3/E22 - Electrochemical Reactions. Electrolytic Cells'. We focus on electrolytic cells, comparing electrolytic and galvanic cells, applications of electrolysis and aluminium.

programme.title: Grade 12 Physical Science
programme.desc: 'S3/E23 - The Chemical Industry. Elements in Fertiliser'. We focus on the elements in fertiliser and the chemical industry.

programme.title: Big School Afrikaans
programme.desc: 'S1'. A collection of locally produced animation in the Afrikaans Language aimed at pre school level, made by Africans for Africans.

programme.title: Big School English
programme.desc: 'S1/E1'. A collection of locally produced animation aimed at preschool level, made by Africans for Africans.

programme.title: Big School IsiXhosa
programme.desc: 'S1'. A collection of locally produced animation in the IsiXhosa Language aimed at pre school level, made by Africans for Africans.

programme.title: Mathematics Teacher Talk
programme.desc: 'S1 - Graphs'. We speak about graphs and how these can be taught in Grades 8 and 9. Graphs require integrating knowledge of functions.

programme.title: Great Lesson Ideas
programme.desc: 'S1 - Exit Ticket'. In this foundation phase module the learners complete a short activity to assess their understanding of the lesson objective.

programme.title: Grade 1 Literacy
programme.desc: 'S3/E32 - Nouns'. We learn how to use nouns correctly in writing (Part 1). To get episode, notes on this episode send a whatsapp to +27 60 070 3308 with the code G1T3W7E2.

programme.title: Grade 2 Literacy
programme.desc: 'S3/E32 - Phonics: The ee Sounds'. We learn how to recognise vowel diagraphs. To get lesson notes on this episode send a whatsapp to +27 60 070 3308 with the code G2T3W7E2.

programme.title: Grade 3 Literacy
programme.desc: 'S3/E32 - Interpreting information'. We learn how to interpret information from graphical text such as advertisements, pictures, graphs and charts.

programme.title: Incremental Introduction of...
programme.desc: 'Incremental Introduction of African Languages (IIAL). E22 - IsiXhosa'. This program aims to offer children a chance to learn the African languages of IsiXhosa and IsiZulu, in a fun and interactive way.

programme.title: Grade 4 Language
programme.desc: 'S3/E32 - Using A Dictionary'. We learn how to use the dictionary (Part 1 of 2). To get episode, notes on this episode send a whatsapp to +27 60 070 3308 with the code G4T3W7E2.

programme.title: Grade 5 Language
programme.desc: 'S3/E32 - Retelling a story'. We learn how to retell a story (comprehension).

programme.title: Grade 6 Language
programme.desc: 'S3/E32 - Using Appropriate Tenses'. We learn how to use appropriate tenses (Part 1 of 2). To get episode, notes on this episode send a whatsapp to +27 60 070 3308 with the code G6T3W7E2.

programme.title: Grade 7 Mathematics
programme.desc: 'S3 - Mathematical Language'. We look at using mathematical language.

programme.title: Grade 7 Natural Science
programme.desc: 'S3/E19 - Potential and kinetic energy: The Law of Conservation of Energy'. We learn about potential and kinetic energy, mainly the Law of Conservation of Energy.

programme.title: Big School
programme.desc: 'S3/E2'. A collection of locally produced animation aimed at preschool level, made by Africans for Africans.

programme.title: Grade 8 Mathematics
programme.desc: 'S2 - Solving Algebraic equations'. In this lesson we look at solving equations using: additive and multiplicative inverses, laws of exponents, substitution and tables of ordered pairs.

programme.title: Grade 9 Mathematics
programme.desc: 'S2 - Area and Perimeter of Combined Shapes'. In this lesson we look at the use of appropriate formulae to determine area of combined shapes.

programme.title: Grade 10 Physical Science
programme.desc: 'S3/E19 - Aqueous Solutions'. We will look at reactions in aqueous solutions.

programme.title: TenFold Preparation Show

programme.title: Ten Fold Live

programme.title: Ten Fold Live

programme.title: Grade 11 Physical Science
programme.desc: 'S3/E21 - Electostatics and Electric fields'. We focus on superposition in 2D for forces, electric field lines, electric field calculations and superposition of electric fields.

programme.title: Siyaya, Come Wild With Us

programme.desc: 'S1 - West Coast - Heading for bird Island'. Four young explorers set of on a source to sea expedition. First they need to find the source of the Palmiet River high in the mountains.

programme.title: Grade 10 Physical Science
programme.desc: 'S3/E20 - Reactions in Solutions'. We will continue looking at reactions in aqueous solutions.

programme.title: Grade 11 Physical Science
programme.desc: 'S3/E22 - Grade 11 Physical Sciences Electromagnetism'. We focus on the magnetic field and right-hand rule application in straight current-carrying coils, current-carrying loops and solenoids.

programme.desc: 'S3/E24 - The Chlor Alkali Industry'. In this lesson, we focus on the chlor alkali industry and the production of NaoH, Cl2 and H2.

programme.desc: Ocean looks at the policies & projects designed to protect our seas. Ocean explores the themes of pollution and marine life, the blue economy, sustainable fishing, aquaculture, climate change, ocean energy and more.

programme.title: Greek Island Odyssey with Bettany H...
programme.desc: 'Greek Island Odyssey with Bettany Hughes. S1/E6 - Corinth Canal, Corfu and Ithaca'. Bettany sails through the Corinth Canal, and from Corfu she ends her journey at Ithaca.

programme.title: Ancient Engineering
programme.desc: 'S1/E7'. A modern city like New York consumes 1 billion gallons of water every day. But this has meant building vast underground tunnels, diverting rivers, and constructing mighty dams.

programme.title: Africa
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Savannah'. In the Savannah the crew witness lizards stealing flies from lions faces and vast dinosaur-like birds who stalk catfish through huge wetlands.

programme.title: Ben Fogle: Return To The Wild
programme.desc: 'S2/E4 - Arkansas, USA'. Ben Fogle reunites with a former medical student living in the woodlands of Arkansas. Ben discovers the impact a series of injuries have had on his physically demanding wild lifestyle.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Canada
programme.desc: 'S1/E8 - Snowbound'. Becky makes a last-ditch effort to harvest a Muskox.

programme.title: Ancient Egypt By Train
programme.desc: 'S1/E4'. Alice ends her adventure in Aswan, whose quarries provided the granite for the country's vast collection of Ancient Egyptian monuments. She then takes a boat to see the extraordinary Philae Temple.

programme.title: Greek Island Odyssey with Bettany H...
programme.desc: 'Greek Island Odyssey with Bettany Hughes. S1/E6 - Corinth Canal, Corfu and Ithaca'. Bettany sails through the Corinth Canal, and from Corfu she ends her journey at Ithaca.

programme.title: Ancient Engineering
programme.desc: 'S1/E7'. A modern city like New York consumes 1 billion gallons of water every day. But this has meant building vast underground tunnels, diverting rivers, and constructing mighty dams.

programme.title: Ancient Egypt By Train
programme.desc: 'S1/E3'. Alice takes the train to Luxor to see Tutankhamun's tomb and his mummified body in the Valley of the Kings. She also takes a walk along the Avenue of the Sphinxes.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: 'S10/E12 - Women Of The North'. In Alaska's unforgiving climate, the women must use their instincts and ingenuity to survive, thrive and provide for their families.

programme.title: Where The Wild Men Are With Ben Fogle
programme.desc: 'S10/E2 - California'. A couple from Salt Lake City, Utah, decide to move to the mountainous coast of Shelter Cove, California.

programme.title: Greek Island Odyssey with Bettany H...
programme.desc: 'Greek Island Odyssey with Bettany Hughes. S1/E6 - Corinth Canal, Corfu and Ithaca'. Bettany sails through the Corinth Canal, and from Corfu she ends her journey at Ithaca.

programme.title: Africa
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Savannah'. In the Savannah the crew witness lizards stealing flies from lions faces and vast dinosaur-like birds who stalk catfish through huge wetlands.

programme.title: Ben Fogle: Return To The Wild
programme.desc: 'S2/E4 - Arkansas, USA'. Ben Fogle reunites with a former medical student living in the woodlands of Arkansas. Ben discovers the impact a series of injuries have had on his physically demanding wild lifestyle.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Canada
programme.desc: 'S1/E8 - Snowbound'. Becky makes a last-ditch effort to harvest a Muskox.

programme.title: The World's Deadliest Weather
programme.desc: 'S4/E1'. The Bahamas gets pounded by 200mph winds during category 5 Hurricane Dorian, the most intense cyclone the country has ever seen. A mother and her baby are forced to swim through shark infested waters.

programme.title: Where The Wild Men Are With Ben Fogle
programme.desc: 'S10/E3 - Oregon'. Ben spends time with Pirate Rob, who lives for half the year with his 18-year-old son Damien in a sandbag house on an island in the middle of an industrial river in Oregon.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: 'S10/E13 - Break Up Time Is Wake Up Time'. Our Alaskans emerge from a long winter and seize new opportunities to travel, hunt, and farm while facing the dangers from thawing rivers.

programme.title: The World's Deadliest Weather
programme.desc: 'S4/E2'. A 19-year-old girl and her father go face-to-face with a fast-moving inferno as wildfires rip through Victoria, Australia. In the French Alps, two British skiers are engulfed by an avalanche.

programme.title: Inside The Factory
programme.desc: 'S5/E4 - Mattresses'. Gregg Wallace is in Leeds at an enormous mattress factory that produces 600 bouncy beds every day.

programme.title: Africa
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Cape'. This episode reveals how the clash of two currents - one warm, one cold - creates the incredible spectacle of the 'sardine run' off the Great Cape.

programme.title: New Zealand By Train
programme.desc: 'S1/E1'. Commencing from the city of Auckland, New Zealand from a Train travels through the North Island passing viaducts and passing through rich farmlands to the dramatic scenery of the central volcanic plateau.

programme.title: Ancient Egypt By Train
programme.desc: 'S1/E4'. Alice ends her adventure in Aswan, whose quarries provided the granite for the country's vast collection of Ancient Egyptian monuments. She then takes a boat to see the extraordinary Philae Temple.

programme.title: Inside The Factory
programme.desc: 'S5/E5 - Pasties'. Gregg Wallace is in Cornwall at an enormous bakery where they produce 180,000 Cornish pasties a day. He follows the production of the pastry snacks from the arrival of two tonnes of swedes right through to dispatch.

programme.title: The Battle to Beat Malaria
programme.desc: 'S1/E1'. Meet the scientists, doctors and volunteers engaged in the battle against the scourge of malaria.

programme.title: Ben Fogle: Return To The Wild
programme.desc: 'S2/E5 - Fiji, Pacific Ocean'. Ben Fogle is reunited with seafarer Rick, who made a fresh start on the Pacific island of Fiji after previously living off the coast of French Polynesia.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Canada
programme.desc: 'S2/E1 - Fresh Starts'. Becky and family establish a 'Fish Camp' on the shores of Great Slave Lake.

programme.title: Ottoman Empire By Train
programme.desc: 'S1/E1'. Alice Roberts begins her Ottoman adventure in Adana, near Syria.?She explores an historic mosque and finds out about the origins of Turkish delight.

programme.title: New Zealand By Train
programme.desc: 'S1/E1'. Commencing from the city of Auckland, New Zealand from a Train travels through the North Island passing viaducts and passing through rich farmlands to the dramatic scenery of the central volcanic plateau.

programme.title: Ranch To Table
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - A Ranch BBQ'. Elizabeth prepares a special barbecue dinner for her family visiting the ranch. She makes fresh baked herb focaccia with edible flowers and BBQ pork ribs.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: 'S7/E23 - Lyon'. Andrew Zimmern explores the legendary and timeless cuisine of Lyon, France. The city is renowned for its delicious dishes like breaded beef tripe and pink pralines.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: 'S7/E24 - Alsace'. Andrew Zimmern discovers the French and Germany inspired food of Alsace, France. He experiences rustic flavours with local ingredients like Choucroute garnie.

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: 'S56/E7 - Neck And Neck'. The chefs find a deep-fried treat and a special seafood surprise in the appetiser basket. Then, they must make creative dishes out of ostrich neck and curry ketchup.

programme.title: Best Bite In Town
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Port St. Lucie'. Guy Fieri summons Noah Cappe, Joe Sasto and Aarti Sequeira to try Japanese, Jamaican, Cuban, Greek and American favourites in Port St. Lucie, Florida!

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible
programme.desc: 'S19/E2 - A Big Mess in Texas'. Robert Irvine travels to Joshua, TX, to save a failing Tex-Mex restaurant with subpar food and a strained relationship between the owners.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins, And Dives
programme.desc: 'S35/E10 - Chicken, Steak And Cake'. This trip, Guy's grabs sweet and savoury, both hot and cold. In San Juan, Puerto Rico, a Venezuelan food stand serves up amazing arepas.

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: 'S55/E2 - Julia Child's Kitchen: Part 1'. Creativity blossoms as four Julia Child fans compete with baskets inspired by Julia's recipes for a chance to win a dream trip to France!

programme.title: Spring Baking Championship
programme.desc: 'S7/E2 - Spring Celebrations'. The bakers are tasked with making colourful and spicy sweets for the Hindu festival of Holi. Then, they must whip up a cheeky leprechaun dessert.

programme.title: BBQ Brawl: Flay Vs Burrell Vs Tila
programme.desc: 'S3/E6 - Not Your Average 'Cue'. Anything can be smoked or grilled! The teams are challenged to master unconventional BBQ ingredients and show their true potential.

programme.title: The Kitchen
programme.desc: 'S22/E4 - Easiest Labor Day Party Ever'. The end of summer means easy recipes for Labor Day cookouts. The spread includes pork tenderloin with grilled peaches and jalapeno honey butter corn.

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: 'S56/E8 - Friendsgiving'. Celebrating the trendy tradition of hosting a Friendsgiving meal, four teams of best buddies compete to make the ultimate Thanksgiving feast.

programme.title: Extreme Cake Wars
programme.desc: 'S1/E22 - Wonder Woman'. It's the 75th anniversary of Wonder Woman, and four bakers compete to make a cake fit for an Amazon princess to help celebrate the iconic superhero's birthday.

programme.title: Extreme Cake Wars
programme.desc: 'S1/E23 - Roald Dahl'. Four bakers will have to put their imaginations into overdrive as they compete to have their cake at the centennial celebration of beloved children's author Roald Dahl.

programme.title: Extreme Cake Wars
programme.desc: 'S1/E24 - The Addams Family'. It's about to get a little creepy and kooky, because the Addams Family are in town. Four talented bakers battle to have their amazing cake creations at the party.

programme.title: Best Bite In Town
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Davis'. Guy Fieri sends Noah Cappe, Tiffani Faison and Jet Tila to hit the restaurant scene in Davis, California, where they find bicycle-friendly eateries and high-end sushi joints.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins, And Dives
programme.desc: 'S34/E3 - Takeout: All Over The Menu'. Guy and Hunter cook chicken and biscuits from Brooklyn and Jamaican oxtail and wings from Cincinnati. And there's a new kind of crab cake from Baltimore.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins, And Dives
programme.desc: 'S34/E4 - Takeout: Real Deal Delivery'. Guy and Hunter serve up real deal barbecue from Los Angeles, wild Thai dishes out of Phoenix and a monster lasagne from Minneapolis.

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: 'S46/E3 - Booza Blues'. Four chefs are challenged to create an appetiser with shrimp and yellow hot pepper paste. In the dessert basket, they are given strawberry cream liqueur and sumac.

programme.title: Halloween Wars
programme.desc: 'S13/E2 - Good Vs. Evil'. The teams conjure up displays inspired by the classic film, The Exorcist. Next, they must showcase the ultimate battle between good vs evil.

programme.title: Symon's Dinners Cooking Out
programme.desc: 'S4/E13 - It's Simply The Zest'. Michael Symon prepares fluke Milanese and keeps things fresh with a shaved courgette salad. Liz tops it all off with a lemon drop martini.

programme.title: Symon's Dinners Cooking Out
programme.desc: 'S4/E14 - Pork Roastin' And Toastin''. Michael Symon prepares smoked pork butt for pulled pork sandwiches along with crispy fried courgette chips with parmesan.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible
programme.desc: 'S19/E3 - Out With Old, In With New'. Robert is in San Diego, California to save a German restaurant stuck in the past. Owner and chef Peter is afraid to change his late dad's design.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins, And Dives
programme.desc: 'S35/E11 - Flavour Expedition'. Guy Fieri's worldwide journey of flavour starts in Caguas, Puerto Rico, with churrasco steak and risotto and ropa vieja dumplings.

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: 'S55/E4 - Julia Child's Kitchen: Part 3'. Four chefs honour Julia Child's legacy and compete to impress guest judge Isabella Rossellini with a potato product that would have made Julia cringe.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins And Dives: Triple...
programme.desc: 'Diners, Drive-Ins And Dives: Triple D Nation. S5/E11 - Fresh And Fried'. Guy Fieri digs into fresh and fried favourites, including pan-fried noodles, eggrolls with a Philly twist and an incredible beef brisket.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins And Dives: Triple...
programme.desc: 'Diners, Drive-Ins And Dives: Triple D Nation. S5/E12 - From Steak To Seafood'. Guy Fieri has a turf-and-surf soiree with savoury steak in Orlando, soul food in Memphis, and next-level chowder in Rhode Island.

programme.title: Supermarket Stakeout
programme.desc: 'S6/E10 - No Utensils Needed'. Four chefs need all hands-on deck to deliver a dish that needs two hands to take down. Then, they hit the fryers to create fried finger food.

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: 'S49/E2 - Comfort Food: Mac And Cheese'. The chefs tackle mac and cheese. The first-round basket includes a cocktail, and the entree round features a mac and cheese-inspired brunch item.

programme.title: Guy's Ranch Kitchen
programme.desc: 'S6/E10 - Luxe On A Dime'. Guy Fieri gets luxury for less with an irresistible menu. It features mussels, anchovies, roasted chicken thighs, and candy bar pain au chocolat.

programme.title: Spring Baking Championship
programme.desc: 'S7/E3 - Spring Bunnies And Chickens, Oh My!'. Host Ali Khan challenges the bakers to create beautiful edible eggs with a surprise flavour and decorative spring chick.

programme.title: BBQ Brawl: Flay Vs Burrell Vs Tila
programme.desc: 'S3/E7 - Social Media Connection'. Social media is one of the best ways for BBQ cooks to find inspiration. The teams must prove that they know how to cook, and connect, on social.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins, And Dives
programme.desc: 'S29/E12 - Whole Lotta Comfort'. Guy Fieri dives into hearty helpings of comfort food. He starts with an eatery that serves up Southern seafood and fried chicken in Atlanta.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins, And Dives
programme.desc: 'S29/E13 - Eating Up New Orleans'. Guy Fieri is taking a tasty tour of New Orleans, Louisiana. He stops at a seafood restaurant that serves up creative dishes and tries potato salad with a twist.

programme.title: Supermarket Stakeout
programme.desc: 'S6/E3 - Judges Takeover Heat No. 3'. Karen Akunowicz, Viet Pham, and Zac Young create a seafood dish. Then, the chefs get to the meat of the matter to earn a spot in the finale.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible
programme.desc: 'S20/E5 - Fighting For Your Family'. Robert Irvine visits family-run Amistad Grill in Florida. Owner Omar has trust issues that cause him to constantly scold his wife and daughter.

programme.title: Ranch To Table
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Catching Dinner'. Elizabeth Poett catches and serves fresh fish for a date night with her husband, complete with lemon dill sauce, saffron rice and ricotta cookies.

programme.title: Overhaulin'
programme.desc: 'S8/E7 - Doug's 1955 Ford Thunderbird'. Can a group of custom car builders working with lightning speed on a budget turn a guy's clunker into a hot car without him knowing it?

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Demolition Theatre
programme.desc: 'S3/E5'. Christie, Russell, and Mike join Richard on the couch to watch the web's latest videos of astonishing accidents.

programme.title: Bitchin' Rides
programme.desc: 'S4/E7 - That's One Bitchin' Grocery Getter'. Repeat client Ron Meis gives the team a huge project with a 1927 Shadow Rod. Dave has some big style upgrades for a new 2017 Bentley Bentayga.

programme.title: Fish Or Die
programme.desc: 'S1/E8 - Pirates Of Papua New Guinea'. Off the eastern tip of Papua New Guinea lies Milne Bay: the rumoured home to huge schools of the giant trevally. The crew try to hook one on a fly rod.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier
programme.desc: 'S4/E10 - Journey To Perl Island'. Otto, Jane & Shane transport a cabin to the distant and uninhabited Perl Island. But things take a sinister turn when they discover a predator on the loose.

programme.title: America: Facts Vs Fiction
programme.desc: 'S3/E12 - The Rock And The Bridge'. If Alcatraz was so harsh, why did inmates ask to be transferred there? And why did the Navy want to paint the bridge a garish yellow and black?

programme.title: How It's Made
programme.desc: 'S10/E2 - Curling Stones/Refrigerators/Aluminium Baseball Bats'. More everyday items are put under the microscope as we discover how they are made, including curling stones, refrigerators, aluminium baseball bats and opalescent glass.

programme.title: Street Outlaws
programme.desc: 'S5/E6 - Clashes And Crashes'. After a dramatic race night, tensions are high - and racers wonder who they can trust as they prepare to race. Plus, a terrifying crash shocks the racers.

programme.title: Ultimate Ninja Challenge
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Prepared For Battle'. Nine warriors must undertake a series of survival missions in the freezing regions of Canada for 24 days according to the laws of the Ninja.

programme.title: How It's Made
programme.desc: 'S10/E3 - Levels/Hot Dogs/Abrasive Grains/Sandpaper'. More everyday items are put under the microscope as we discover how they are made, including levels, hot dogs, abrasive grains and sandpaper.

programme.desc: 'S5/E6 - Clashes And Crashes'. After a dramatic race night, tensions are high - and racers wonder who they can trust as they prepare to race. Plus, a terrifying crash shocks the racers.

programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Four-Wheel Wheelie Machine'. It's an epic competition day as two shops try to lift their front ends, and their spirits, and ride their way into the Detroit final.

programme.title: Shifting Gears With Aaron Kaufman
programme.desc: 'S1/E11 - Wildwood Or Bust'. Aaron and his builders rush to get the Model A Dragster and Harley WLA ready for the Race of Gentlemen. But problems with the dragster threaten his chances.

programme.title: Overhaulin'
programme.desc: 'S8/E7 - Doug's 1955 Ford Thunderbird'. Can a group of custom car builders working with lightning speed on a budget turn a guy's clunker into a hot car without him knowing it?

programme.title: Street Outlaws

programme.desc: 'S3/E6'. Christie, Russell, and Mike join Richard on the couch to watch the web's latest videos of astonishing accidents.

programme.title: Bitchin' Rides

programme.title: Ultimate Car Build-Off
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Tank Tread Truck'. 'Voodoo Choppers' and 'Alternative Automotive Technologies' tackle the realm of treaded vehicles as they attempt to turn trucks into tanks capable of taking on an obstacle course.

programme.title: Finding Escobar's Millions
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - The Don'. Ex-CIA operatives Doug Laux and Ben Smith begin their search for Pablo Escobar's hidden millions. Their first excavation takes them into a dangerous barrio Pablo built.

programme.title: Dual Survival

programme.title: Vat Jou Goed En Trek
programme.desc: 'S8/E12 of 13'. Na 'n egskeiding het Dirk besluit dit is tyd om sy eiendom in Irene te verkoop en Kaap toe te trek. Hy roep die hulp van die span in om sy huis op te knap en vir 'n beter prys te verkoop.

programme.title: Mal Kamper
programme.desc: 'S3/E12 of 13'. Ons bly op 'n huisboot op die Breerivier, zipline en geniet 'n klomp wilde avonture teen die Gouritsrivier. Ons verken die Overberg area en kamp teen die see en 4x4 'n duineroete.

programme.title: Kokkedoor: Vuur en Vlam
programme.desc: 'S1/E11 of 13'. Met Mnr Groen in die omtrek moet braaiers op rook, hul sintuie en malvapoeding staatmaak eerder as vleisvaardighede. Die epiese vuurstryd bepaal immers wie gaan deurdring na die semi-finaal.

programme.title: Afgrond
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 of 10'. Julia ontdek dat Riana iets vir haar en Basson geheim hou. Basson se gedrag teenoor Nadine het lelike gevolge vir haar.

programme.title: Koortjies Met Elwira Standili
programme.desc: 'S1/E11 of 13'. Ons gesels met die gesoute akteurs David Isaacs en Oscar Peterson van die Joe Barber-faam oor die belangrikheid van gesonde vriendskappe. Dan wys Marcellino Swartz hoe 'n Grabouwer kan sing.

programme.title: Laataand By Rian
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 of 13'. Rian verwelkom die uitgeworpe ANC-lid Carl Niehaus. Hulle gesels oor sy hoogs kontroversiële outobiografie wat op pad is asook oor die ware toedrag van sake in die land.

programme.title: Musiekvideo's
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 of 2'. Musiekvideo's vir elke smaak.

programme.title: GROOTplaas
programme.desc: 'S10/E33 of 88'. Mia gesels verder met Willie Clack van UNISA oor die beste maniere om veediefstal in Suid-Afrika te bekamp.

programme.title: Die Boodskap: Vir Jou Lewensreis
programme.desc: 'S5/E152 of 236'. Inspirasie vir jou lewensreis vanuit Mosaïek gemeente. Saam met Melissa Botma verken ons die geskenk van intimiteit.

programme.title: Die GROOT Ontbyt
programme.desc: 'S10/E33 of 87'. Aktualiteit, nuus, verkeer, weer en lekker Afrikaanse musiek is alles op die spyskaart, saam met #DieGrootOntbyt-span.

programme.desc: 'S2/E39'. Juffrou Vis en haar jolige skool onder water lag plesierig, speel en leer elke dag. Jy sal Karnallie, die garnaalkie, Siebert die seeperdjie, Willie die skilpad en vele meer ontmoet.

programme.title: Die GROOT Ontbyt
programme.desc: 'S10/E33 of 87'. Aktualiteit, nuus, verkeer, weer en lekker Afrikaanse musiek is alles op die spyskaart, saam met #DieGrootOntbyt-span.

programme.title: Fiks Of Niks
programme.desc: 'S1/E11 of 13'. Hierdie week speel Rhona tennis in 'n nuwe rolstoel. Lizahn voltooi haar IVF en kyk uit vir 'n familiemotor terwyl Henck sterk besig is om met moontlike deelnemers onderhoude te voer.

programme.title: Mal Kamper
programme.desc: 'S3/E12 of 13'. Ons bly op 'n huisboot op die Breerivier, zipline en geniet 'n klomp wilde avonture teen die Gouritsrivier. Ons verken die Overberg area en kamp teen die see en 4x4 'n duineroete.

programme.title: ontbytSAKE
programme.desc: 'S11/E25 of 52'. Ons ateljeegas is die aktrise en aanbieder, Lee-Ann van Rooi, en in die SAKEfokus wys ons julle 'n verskeidenheid ondernemings in Gauteng en die Wes-Kaap.

programme.title: Moederhart
programme.desc: 'S1/E149 of 160'. Sommer met die intrapslag in die villa is daar wrywing tussen Tarik en die ander kinders. Ahmet wag vir Cemre buite die villa.

programme.title: Suidooster
programme.desc: 'S10/E125 of 199'. JPD het 'n bou krisis, of kan Imelda die saak oplos? Angie gaan nie net terugsit en toekyk nie, terwyl Kaashifa toenemend desperaat raak om tot Imelda deur te dring.

programme.title: Skemergrond
programme.desc: 'S1/E49 of 106'. Ruan is reg vir die volgende stap in sy verhouding met Patty. Hazel dring aan om te weet wat met Jasmine aangaan. Gloria is rasend van bekommernis.

programme.title: Klaskamer 10
programme.desc: 'S8/E72 of 105'. In wiskunde behandel Martin graad 10 wiskunde konsepte. Werner kyk, tydens die FW deel van die les, na die fisiese wetenskappe konsepte wat in graad 10 bemeester moet word.

programme.title: Super Rugby
programme.desc: 'S11/E36 of 47'. Kenners kyk na die jongste ontwikkelinge in die rugby-wêreld. Ateljeegaste neem ook deel aan besprekings en beantwoord kykers se inbelvrae.

programme.title: Leef Jou Reis
programme.desc: 'S12/E12 of 17'. Die ikoon van wildkyk-ervarings wag op jou in die Serengeti. Ons is opsoek na die bykans 2,5 miljoen blouwildebeeste wat besig is om te migreer van die suide na die noorde.

programme.title: Poena
programme.desc: 'S1/E23 of 26'. Coco het haar hande vol met Franko Vogel, na hulle aandjie saam. Poen en Coco betree 'n nuwe vlak in hulle verhouding. Elton help om Poena se liedjies terug te kry op die internet.

programme.title: Binnelanders
programme.desc: 'S13/E82 of 260'. Naomi is beïndruk met Conrad, en Tracy is geskok wanneer Binneland Stereo haar geheim verklap. Elise vryf 'n Binneland-suster verkeerd op.

programme.title: Moederhart

programme.title: My Heart Knows
programme.desc: 'S4/E56'. Pawar tells Kalyani that he will find a way to help her. Kalyani pays Anupriya a visit in the jail.

programme.title: Amulya's Wedding
programme.desc: 'S1/E13 - 1/13'. Vedanth and Amulya, two individuals with contrasting personalities, constantly argue with each other. However, they soon fall for each other and try to make their relationship work.

programme.title: This Is Fate
programme.desc: 'S7/E4 - 7/4'. Rakhee confronts Nidhi about brainwashing Shourya against his biological mother, Preeta. Shourya and his friends start racing with the bus on the highway and cause an accident.

programme.desc: 'S1/E125 - 1/125'. Shiv, a doctor, is emotionally distant due to the events that occurred in his past. His path crosses with Shakti, an orphan who is good at nurturing the broken ones.

programme.title: Force Of Attraction
programme.desc: 'S1/E125 - 1/125'. Shiv, a doctor, is emotionally distant due to the events that occurred in his past. His path crosses with Shakti, an orphan who is good at nurturing the broken ones.

programme.title: Sister Wives

programme.desc: 'S1/E67'. Nia gets upset when she sees Asha, Disha, Chhavi and her grandma making fun of her mom, Mohini.

programme.title: My Heart Knows

programme.title: Ringside Rebel
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - 1/5'. Ishita gives a tip to Rudra that if he wants Phulki, he needs to go through her father as he is a very greedy man.

programme.title: Un...Fortunate Love
programme.desc: 'S4/E144'. Lakshmi and Rishi struggle to defend their love against the relentless interference of Malishka, who will stop at nothing to claim Rishi for herself.

programme.desc: 'S1/E86 - 1/86'. In a serendipitous meeting, Gouri, an ardent worshipper of Goddess Kali, crosses paths with Ishan, a doctor who holds strong atheist beliefs.

programme.title: Undercover Love
programme.desc: 'S1/E263 - 1/263'. Special crime branch officer Jagaddhatri attempts to balance her personal and work life, but keeping her real identity a secret whilst running an NGO.

programme.title: My Journey To You
programme.desc: 'S1/E86 - 1/86'. Amruta, a romantic who values the connection of love and marriage, crosses paths with Virat, who carries the wounds of a failed relationship.

programme.title: After Everything
programme.desc: The fifth and final chapter of the After franchise. Hardin travels to Portugal in search of a woman he wronged in the past - and in hopes of finding himself.

programme.title: The Stand In
programme.desc: This funny rom-com stars Drew Barrymore in a dual role. When Candy is sentenced to rehab, she sends her acting double, but things take a turn as her stand-in takes over her life.

programme.title: The Fallout
programme.desc: An emotionally moving and gripping drama about a teenager trying to cope with complex trauma in the aftermath of a school shooting.

programme.title: Minari
programme.desc: Youn Yuh-Jung won an Oscar for her role in this critically acclaimed drama. A Korean family moves to Arkansas to start a farm, but their new beginning comes with challenges.

programme.title: Somewhere In Queens
programme.desc: A sports drama filled with the ups and downs of family life. A father risks tearing his family apart when his son's chances to get a life-changing basketball scholarship are jeopardised.

programme.title: Yogi Bear
programme.desc: The beloved cartoon character gets his own comedy. When a documentary filmmaker arrives at Jellystone Park to shoot a project, she quickly crosses paths with the infamous Yogi Bear.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Thomasina Sawyer
programme.desc: Mark Twain's iconic work is adapted into an epic film. After witnessing an innocent man being falsely accused of murder, Tom Sawyer and Huck Finn embark on an adventure.

programme.title: Rugrats In Paris: The Movie
programme.desc: Chuckie and the whole gang go on an overseas adventure in their full-length movie. Chuckie is on a mission to find a new mom before his dad marries an evil businesswoman.

programme.title: Open Season
programme.desc: A humourous satire about TV rating wars. A TV ratings computer malfunctions, inaccurately reporting that the audience prefers public television.

programme.title: Mummies
programme.desc: An adventure-filled animation with a genuine sense of humour. Three mummies journey to present-day London, searching for an old ring belonging to a royal family.

programme.title: The School Of Rock
programme.desc: This upbeat, endearing, musical comedy earned Jack Black a Golden Globe nomination as he gave a class of preppy students a music lesson in rock and roll they'll never forget.

programme.title: Clueless
programme.desc: Alicia Silverstone stars in this cult classic teen movie that follows the antics of a rich, popular high school girl as she tries to navigate the harshness of teen life.

programme.title: Ghostbusters
programme.desc: Melissa McCarthy and an amazing female cast drive this pulsating remake of the 80s classic. Manhattan is being invaded by ghosts and it's up to a rag-tag team of women to save it.

programme.title: The Boss
programme.desc: Melissa McCarthy gives a savage act in this riotous comedy. A titan of the industry goes to prison for insider trading. On her release, she tries to mend the bridges she burnt.

programme.title: Beautiful Wedding
programme.desc: Dylan Sprouse stars in this romcom. After a crazy night in Las Vegas, Abby and Travis discover they are married. They head to Mexico for a honeymoon with friends and family.

programme.title: The Protégé
programme.desc: Maggie Q leads this all-star cast in this action movie. When the mentor of the world's best contract killer is killed, she vows to avenge the man who taught her everything.

programme.title: Land Of Bad
programme.desc: Luke and Liam Hemsworth, and Russell Crowe drive this action movie. A US Army special forces unit is ambushed during a mission- their only hope - a remote Air Force drone operator.

programme.title: Lyla
programme.desc: A psychological thriller mystery. A husband takes his family on a getaway to complete his first book but struggles to maintain his sanity after multiple visits from mysterious strangers.

programme.title: She Is Not Your Daughter
programme.desc: A thrilling film that will keep you on the edge of your seat. When Kathy's family is threatened, she discovers that her teen daughter is not her flesh and blood.

programme.title: Glimpse
programme.desc: This thriller revolves around corporate spying. A ruthless oligarch manipulates and spies on a group of corporate employees.

programme.title: Rift
programme.desc: A gripping action thriller. Jason Cole, an FBI Agent, appears to have it all until his past rears its head and propels him into a situation he could not have prepared for.

programme.title: 3 Days In Malay
programme.desc: A gripping WWII action film inspired by a true story. A group of Marines must defend their airfield in Malay against the Japanese for three days.

programme.title: A Small Fortune
programme.desc: A gritty crime thriller. A desperate man living in a small village finds a large stash of money and decides to keep it, but his decision quickly turns deadly.

programme.title: A Million Days
programme.desc: A gripping sci-fi thriller. It's 2041, Earth is in ecological collapse, and humanity's survival rests on settling new worlds. But the mission's AI assistant has a secret agenda.

programme.title: Batman V Superman: Dawn Of Justice
programme.desc: The Man of Steel and the Dark Knight face-off in an epic battle in this much-anticipated superhero epic from director Zack Snyder.

programme.title: Occupation: Rainfall
programme.desc: It's non-stop action in this sci-fi. Two years after aliens land on Earth, survivors from Sydney, Australia, fight in a desperate war as the number of casualties continue to grow.

programme.title: Detective Knight: Rogue
programme.desc: Bruce Willis propels this action film. After they shoot his partner, a veteran detective pursues a group of thieves from LA to New York but soon finds his past conflicting with his case.

programme.title: Breaking In
programme.desc: Gabrielle Union is fierce in this captivating thriller. When her two kids are taken hostage after a break-in, a mother must do everything to save them.
